query:
-- S552C is Exetel TFS500R1 $1181.82 - check if it has any billing items
SELECT bi.id, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.serviceExternalId
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.serviceExternalId = 'S552C';

-- Check all Middlemount services
SELECT externalId, planName, provider, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue
FROM services WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0161'
ORDER BY monthlyCost DESC;

-- Check Legrand billing items
SELECT bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.serviceExternalId
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.contactName LIKE '%Legrand%'
ORDER BY bi.lineAmount DESC;

-- Check Osprey services
SELECT externalId, planName, provider, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue
FROM services WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0038';
